# health

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Surfaces server restarts as a toast; exposes /api/health helpers. Liveness endpoint used by clients to detect server restarts.
- Web:
  - Contributes:
    - `Core.Root` → `ReconnectWatcher`
    - `Core.Root` → `WedgeWatchdog`
    - `ActionBar.Item` → `HealthDot`
  - Uses:
    - `infra/endpoints.fetchEndpoint`
    - `primitives/css/center.Center`
    - `primitives/css/status-dot.StatusDot`
    - `primitives/live-state.getNotificationsClient`
    - `primitives/live-state.liveStateSocketKind`
    - `primitives/live-state.useNotificationsChannelStatuses`
    - `primitives/networking.subscribeWsStatus`
    - `primitives/tooltip.WithTooltip`
    - `shell/action-bar.ActionBar`
    - `shell/toast.showToast`
  - Exports (types): `WedgeReport`
  - Exports (values):
    - `getHealth`
    - `waitForRestart`
    - `wedgeReportSink`
- Server:
  - Uses:
    - `infra/endpoints.HttpError`
    - `infra/endpoints.implement`
  - Routes:
    - `GET /api/health`
    - `GET /api/health/ready`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `reports/crash`
  - Endpoint callers: `launcher`
- Shared:
  - Exports (types): `HealthResponse`
  - Exports (values):
    - `getHealth`
    - `HealthResponseSchema`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
